title: ZoomSensitivityFix
description: The mod reduces mouse sensitivity when the server FOV decreases. This is useful when playing on servers with sniper rifles.
body:
# **What is this mod for?**
When you played on servers with weapons, while aiming at the sights with a large multiplicity, you might notice that **the sensitivity of the mouse increases** several times with proximity, which caused discomfort due to a decrease in the accuracy of your movements, that is, **the sensitivity of the mouse** directly depended on **the field of view**.

### This mod corrects this inaccuracy and allows the user to play **comfortably**.
